vocab.meaning: những thiết bị công nghệ không thể thiếu
vocab.example: My smartphone and wireless earbuds are indispensable gadgets that I never leave behind when navigating the city.

vocab.meaning: làm đầy túi quần bằng những thứ lộn xộn
vocab.example: I generally avoid carrying loose change or old receipts because I don't like to clutter my pockets with unnecessary items.

vocab.meaning: các loại giấy tờ tùy thân thiết yếu
vocab.example: I always keep a slim cardholder in my jacket to store my essential credentials, such as my driver's license and national ID.

vocab.meaning: một bộ đồ dùng tối giản, tinh gọn
vocab.example: I prefer a streamlined set of items to ensure I can move around freely without being weighed down by a heavy bag.

vocab.meaning: đồ dự phòng cho trường hợp khẩn cấp
vocab.example: I usually tuck a small amount of cash into my phone case as an emergency backup in case a merchant doesn't accept digital payments.

vocab.meaning: kích thước nhỏ gọn bỏ túi
vocab.example: I carry a pocket-sized notebook for jotting down spontaneous ideas that strike me while I'm out and about.
I make sure to stow away my keys in a zippered compartment to prevent them from accidentally falling out.

vocab.meaning: những thứ thiết yếu khi đang di chuyển
vocab.example: A portable power bank has become one of my core on-the-go essentials to keep my devices charged throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: bỏ vào một cách bừa bãi/tiện tay
vocab.example: Unlike most people, I never have items haphazardly tossed into my bag; everything has its designated spot.
I take a minimalist approach to my daily carry, often leaving the house with nothing more than my keys and my phone.
